prompt:
Fix the monitor-input script in home/monitor-input.nix. The two input options should be DisplayPort (dp) and Thunderbolt (tb), NOT USB-C. There is no HDMI connected. Change:
1. In home/monitor-input.nix: rename the 'usbc' option to 'tb', update its label to 'Thunderbolt', update the usage string to show 'dp|tb', and update the Hyprland keybinding description from 'USB-C' to 'Thunderbolt'.
2. The VCP value for Thunderbolt may differ from USB-C (currently 0x11) - keep 0x11 for now since Thunderbolt often uses the same VCP value on Dell monitors, but update the comment to say Thunderbolt instead of USB-C.
3. Make sure all references to USB-C are changed to Thunderbolt throughout the file.

Do NOT touch any other files - only home/monitor-input.nix needs changes.
